title: Medium Story Backdating Tool
description: Set any publication date on your Medium story in under 2 minutes

index.intro: Medium doesn't let you set a custom publication date — but you can work around it via the import feature. This tool generates a page with your chosen date that you can import into {0} to backdate your story.

backdatedUrl.label: Your Backdated Page Link:
backdatedUrl.openLink: Or click here to open the backdated page →

steps.selectDate: Use the date picker above to {0} your desired publish date

figureCaption.importField: Paste this link in Medium's import field
figureCaption.importResult: The imported story will have a published date of your choice, replace the placeholder text with your own content.
figureCaption.canonicalSettings: Remove the canonical link setting in Story Settings => Advanced Settings

note.title: Note:
note.content: Medium reads the publication date embedded in imported pages and uses it as the story's publish date. This tool creates pages with the correct metadata format. For detailed instructions on importing, visit {0}.

backdated.title: Backdated Page for Medium Import
backdated.description: Backdated page for Medium import with publication date {date}

error.title: Invalid date format
error.message: The date parameter should be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
error.description: Invalid date format for Medium import

backdated.info: This page is ready to import — Medium will use the date shown above as the story's publication date.
backdated.instruction: Copy the URL of this page and import it directly into Medium using the URL import option.

sampleContent.title: Sample Content
sampleContent.intro: You can replace this content with your own after importing into Medium. This is just placeholder text to ensure Medium has something to import.
sampleContent.paragraph1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Nullam eget felis eget urna commodo facilisis. Suspendisse potenti. Sed varius magna a tortor faucibus, in tincidunt leo congue.
sampleContent.paragraph2: Etiam ut nunc auctor, commodo velit a, condimentum elit. Cras scelerisque nibh ut dolor maximus, id pellentesque nibh lobortis. Duis consectetur magna vel ex laoreet, sed dignissim orci semper.
sampleContent.closing: Once imported to Medium, you can replace this content with your actual article.

howTo.title: How to use this page:

steps.pasteUrl: Paste this URL in Medium's URL import field
steps.replace: The imported story will have a published date of your choice, replace the placeholder text with your own content.

howTo.guide: Read Medium's official guide on importing stories

error.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
